fields.name: Dairy
fields.description: Milk, cheese, yogurt, and other dairy products.

fields.name: Electronics
fields.description: Consumer electronics, gadgets, and accessories.

fields.name: Produce
fields.description: Fresh fruits and vegetables.

fields.name: Bakery
fields.description: Freshly baked bread, pastries, and desserts.

fields.name: Beverages
fields.description: Coffee, tea, juice, and other drinks.

fields.name: Meat & Seafood
fields.description: Fresh and frozen meats, poultry, and seafood.

fields.name: Snacks
fields.description: Chips, crackers, nuts, and other snack foods.

fields.name: Skim Milk (1 Gallon)
fields.description: Fat-free skim milk sourced from local BC dairy farms. Pasteurized and homogenized for a smooth, light taste.

fields.name: 2% Milk (1 Gallon)
fields.description: Partially skimmed 2% milk from local dairy farms. A balanced option with a creamy taste and reduced fat content.

fields.name: Television
fields.description: 55-inch 4K Ultra HD Smart LED TV with built-in streaming apps, HDR support, and Dolby Atmos sound.

fields.name: Organic Bananas (1 lb)
fields.description: Fresh organic bananas, naturally ripened. A great source of potassium and perfect for smoothies or snacking.

fields.name: Sourdough Loaf
fields.description: Artisan sourdough bread baked fresh daily with a crispy crust and tangy, chewy interior. Made with a 24-hour ferment.

fields.name: Cold Brew Coffee (12 oz)
fields.description: Smooth, slow-steeped cold brew coffee made from single-origin Colombian beans. Low acidity and naturally sweet.

fields.name: Atlantic Salmon Fillet
fields.description: Fresh Atlantic salmon fillet, skin-on, rich in omega-3 fatty acids. Sustainably farmed in BC coastal waters.

fields.name: Sea Salt Kettle Chips
fields.description: Crunchy kettle-cooked potato chips seasoned with Pacific sea salt. Small-batch fried for extra crunch.

fields.name: Greek Yogurt (500g)
fields.description: Thick and creamy plain Greek yogurt with high protein content. Strained for a rich, smooth texture.

fields.name: Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds
fields.description: True wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation, 8-hour battery life, and IPX5 water resistance.

fields.name: Organic Avocados (3 pack)
fields.description: Ripe and ready organic Hass avocados. Creamy texture, perfect for toast, guacamole, or salads.

fields.name: Croissant (4 pack)
fields.description: Buttery, flaky croissants baked fresh every morning. Made with European-style butter for an authentic French taste.

fields.name: Matcha Green Tea (20 bags)
fields.description: Premium Japanese matcha green tea bags. Naturally high in antioxidants with a smooth, earthy flavour.

fields.name: Chicken Breast (1 kg)
fields.description: Boneless, skinless chicken breast from free-range BC farms. Lean, versatile protein for any meal.

fields.name: Trail Mix (350g)
fields.description: A hearty mix of almonds, cashews, dried cranberries, dark chocolate chips, and pumpkin seeds.

fields.name: Aged Cheddar (300g)
fields.description: Sharp aged white cheddar, matured for 2 years. Bold flavour with a crumbly texture. Made in BC.

fields.name: USB-C Charging Cable (6 ft)
fields.description: Braided nylon USB-C to USB-C fast charging cable. Supports 100W power delivery and 10Gbps data transfer.

fields.name: Baby Spinach (142g)
fields.description: Pre-washed organic baby spinach leaves. Tender, mild flavour perfect for salads, smoothies, or sautéing.

fields.name: Cinnamon Raisin Bagels (6 pack)
fields.description: Soft, chewy bagels loaded with cinnamon swirl and plump raisins. Baked fresh and perfect for toasting.

fields.name: Orange Juice (1L)
fields.description: Freshly squeezed not-from-concentrate orange juice. No added sugar or preservatives.

fields.name: Ground Beef (500g)
fields.description: Lean ground beef, locally raised and grass-fed. Perfect for burgers, tacos, or pasta sauces.

fields.name: Dark Chocolate Bar (100g)
fields.description: 72% cacao dark chocolate bar made with ethically sourced cocoa beans. Rich, smooth, and slightly bitter.
